description: Steve is an experienced commercial professional and leader with proven expertise in developing and implementing commercial and supply chain strategies in complex environments. During his time with Sellafield Ltd and the Nuclear Decommissioning Authority, Steve held executive roles covering delivery of the full commercial lifecycle across major capital projects, high hazard retrievals and remediation, infrastructure and professional services. Steve has a passion and a proven track record in developing enterprise-level strategy, delivering complex procurements, optimising collaborative contract management approaches and developing long-term functional capability in line with industry best practice. Steve joined Nuclear Waste Services as Commercial Director in May 2024 to drive the rapid and strategic commercial development required to support a growing operational footprint.

details.body:
Steve is an experienced commercial professional and leader with proven expertise in developing and implementing commercial and supply chain strategies in complex environments.

During his time with Sellafield Ltd and the Nuclear Decommissioning Authority, Steve held executive roles covering delivery of the full commercial lifecycle across major capital projects, high hazard retrievals and remediation, infrastructure and professional services.

Steve has a passion and a proven track record in developing enterprise-level strategy, delivering complex procurements, optimising collaborative contract management approaches and developing long-term functional capability in line with industry best practice.

Steve joined Nuclear Waste Services as Commercial Director in May 2024 to drive the rapid and strategic commercial development required to support a growing operational footprint.

Steve joined Nuclear Waste Services as Commercial Director in May 2024 to drive the rapid and strategic commercial development required to support a growing operational footprint.

Steve is an experienced commercial professional and leader with proven expertise in developing and implementing commercial and supply chain strategies in complex environments.

During his time with Sellafield Ltd and the Nuclear Decommissioning Authority, Steve held executive roles covering delivery of the full commercial lifecycle across major capital projects, high hazard retrievals and remediation, infrastructure and professional services.

Steve has a passion and a proven track record in developing enterprise-level strategy, delivering complex procurements, optimising collaborative contract management approaches and developing long-term functional capability in line with industry best practice.

Steve joined Nuclear Waste Services as Commercial Director in May 2024 to drive the rapid and strategic commercial development required to support a growing operational footprint.

James, along with his lead team and the wider Sellafield Ltd Commercial directorate are responsible for the implementation of the Sellafield Ltd Supply Chain Strategy, which ensures the safe, reliable and predictable operation of the business whilst delivering innovative and sustainable long-term value.

role_appointments.title: Steve Glasson - Interim Supply Chain Director
